category.name: zoo.safari
category.item: Safari
Gasoline canister

category.name: zoo.safari.errors
category.item: Too bad! Unfortunately, your level is too low! From level 7 you can start the safari tour!

category.name: zoo.safari.welcomeWindow
category.item:
Welcome to a safari full of adventure: Win great rewards and even new animals!

In the next step, just choose the area where you want to start your safari.

Hurray, into the wild!

category.name: zoo.safari.regionWindow
category.item: Choose a region
Which region do you want to start your safari in? Choose it here: In each region there are 3 areas that you can activate depending on your level.

category.name: zoo.safari.shopWindow
category.item:
Hey adventurer! Go on a real safari. Use the jokers to make your way into the wilderness easier.

Important: Choose only one of each type of joker for your journey!
Do you want to invest %skipTimerCost% zoodollars and start your safari right away?

Are you ready for a safari? Here's how it works: In the next step, you'll see a game: it consists of 9 to 25 face-down cards. The cards hide rewards or animal tracks that you'll follow to get the main prize. But be careful: each card can also hide a trap!

See that gas canister at the bottom right? It shows you how much gas is left in your jeep's tank. As soon as you reveal a card, you'll use up some gas.

And now for the rules of the game: At the beginning, you can only choose cards from the bottom row. Click on a card and it will turn over. This way you can see if you've found something and if so, what it is. Then you can choose cards that are above or below the last card, as well as to the right or left of it. The game ends if you find an animal, but it also ends when you run out of gas.

Increase your chances of a great find with the joker(?) from the store. There are 2 types of jokers: Card and Navigation. Let the Card Joker help you uncover your cards - it will reveal extra cards for you. The Navigation Joker will guide you in the right direction thanks to its compass.

You can take one joker of each type with you on safari. Whether you used the joker or not, you lose it at the end of the safari.

category.name: zoo.safari.miniGame
category.item: Oops, you hit an obstacle. That's annoying, 1 can of gasoline is gone.
Great! You found %treasureCount% %treasureName%. Hurry, keep looking, you can find many more treasures.
Congratulations, look what you found! It's %animal%! Hurry to the zoo, it's waiting for you in your inventory. You've successfully completed your safari.
Do you really want to end the safari? If so, you can't start any more safaris today and your gas and supplies will be gone!
No joker
You're almost at your destination! Unfortunately, your tank is empty. Do you want to fill up for a few zoodollars and continue your safari? Choose how much gas you'd like to buy.
The amount of gas cans for this terrain is %neededGas%. However, you only have %missingGas%. Do you want to buy the necessary gas with zoodollars?
Please choose how much gasoline you want to buy. But be careful: If you don't use up all of your gasoline on safari, the remaining gasoline will be wasted.

category.name: zoo.safari.minigameInfo
category.item: Instructions

Welcome to your safari!
Discover unusual animals and great treasures. But watch where your steps lead. Traps lurk everywhere. Depending on the type of terrain, you will use different amounts of gasoline.

The safari is over as soon as your tank is empty or if you find an animal.
You can enter the wilderness by clicking on one of the lower boxes.
Move in straight lines north, south, west, and east.
You can activate your jokers at any time. They have valuable tips for you that will lead you to your goal faster.
The following terrain types are available:
Simple terrain
You will use 1 unit of gasoline.
More difficult terrain
You will use 3 units of gasoline.
Impassable terrain
Entry prohibited
Explored terrain
You will use 1 unit of gasoline.
You can find the following items:
ANIMAL TRACKS
They indicate the direction where the animal might be located.
TREASURE
Yay, a treasure with a great surprise!
BARRIER
Will cost you 1 gasoline unit.
ENCOUNTER WITH AN ANIMAL
If you encounter an animal, it belongs to you and the mission is over.

category.name: zoo.safari.jokers
category.item: Monkey, the advisor
Sonya, the advisor
Compass
Fast travelling

Everyone needs a little help from time to time. If you let the monkey help, you can reveal one randomly chosen card.

Are you curious? Let's get to it!

Do you want to reveal a certain card and advance in the safari?


Use the help of the advisor Sonia. With her help, you will reveal the card of your choice. This will help you reach your goal faster. Good luck!
Need help? Use the compass as a joker to mark a card for you. You will find the animal you are looking for or a trap on it. Are you eager to find out what is hidden on it? So hurry up and find out!

But now to the point: Are you just crawling towards your goal step by step? Aren't you fast enough?

Then use the joker: He will mark 3 cards for you, among which the animal you are looking for may be hidden, but also a trap.

Animal or trap... Quick, look!

category.name: zoo.safari.tooltip
category.item: You can start your safari after you reach level 7
Jump into the jeep: Click here to start the safari!
Back to the zoo
Small
Medium
Big

You get a certain amount of gasoline cans for each day.
Want more now? Then shorten your waiting time with zoodollars!
Click to buy more gasoline.
This region will be accessible after you reach the level %regionLevel%.

category.name: zoo.safari.button
category.item: Start the safari
Finalize safari
Activate
Deploy
